name: Arizer Glass Connoisseur Bowl
summary: Arizer Glass Connoisseur Bowl — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Arizer Glass Connoisseur Bowl features a glass screen and two separate chambers, providing optimal airflow coverage and offering flexibility in product volume. The Flavour chamber effectively minimises doses, resulting in a smooth, light vapour with delightful taste. For optimal performance, place the bowl away from the heater and fill it with ground herbs. The Cloud Chamber, designed for larger doses, allows for significant vapour production. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
